headline: Proof of Personhood and the Future of Social Finance
summary: 6 minutes is how long the median retail investor researches before buying. The feeds they trust are full of AI personas, and a stolen SSN is all it takes to pass KYC. We've got problems.

headline: Is Robinhood (HOOD) Using Its New Buyback to Redefine Capital Allocation Priorities?
summary: Earlier this week, Robinhood Markets’ board authorized a new US$1.50 billion Class A share repurchase program, expected to span roughly three years and supported by a US$3.25 billion revolving credit facility. This sizable, open-ended buyback replaces prior authorizations and signals management’s confidence in Robinhood’s balance sheet strength and evolving multi-product business model despite recent share price pressure. We’ll now examine how this new US$1.50 billion repurchase plan...
